headline: Walmart Insider Sales And Spark Driver Settlement Frame Valuation Questions
summary: Walmart's largest shareholder, the Walton Family Holdings Trust, has made a second sizable insider share sale in 2026. The trust had already carried out significant sell downs in 2025, affecting insider ownership levels at NasdaqGS:WMT. Separately, Walmart agreed to a $100 million regulatory settlement tied to its Spark Driver delivery program, which includes new compliance measures. These developments land at a time when NasdaqGS:WMT trades around $123.8, after a 3.2% decline over the past...

headline: BJ’s Wholesale makes bold move to lure more shoppers
summary: BJ’s Wholesale, one of the top three warehouse clubs in the U.S., continues to see cautious consumer behavior in its stores. With heightened competition from Costco, Walmart’s Sam’s Club and other rivals, BJ’s is doubling down on a bold strategy to attract more customers. In the fourth quarter of ...

headline: Walton Family Trust Sells Walmart Inc. (WMT) Shares Valued at $220 Million
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. On February 27, 2026, one of Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT)’s significant shareholders, The Walton Family Holdings Trust (ownership greater than 10%), disclosed a major insider move, selling 1,723,236 of the company’s shares in a transaction valued at approximately $220 million. […]
